headline: Bristol Myers Squibb Co (NYSE:BMY): A High Yield Dividend Stock Backed by Strong Profitability
summary: Dividend investing requires balancing income with long-term safety. Discover how the Best Dividend Stocks screen identifies quality payers like Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY), offering a 4.35% yield supported by strong profitability and a cheap valuation near a 10 P/E ratio.
